title: Logical error: 'Column `a.size0` has rows count 0 according to size in memory and size of single value, but data part all_1_1_0 has 1111953 rows'
description:
```sql
create table test (a Array(UInt64), `a.size0` UInt64) engine=MergeTree order by tuple();
insert into test select [number], number from numbers(100000000);
```

poc: create table test (a Array(UInt64), `a.size0` UInt64) engine=MergeTree order by tuple();
insert into test select [number], number from numbers(100000000);
key_bug_features: Column size mismatch during data insertion in MergeTree
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (a Array(Int32), b Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO test1 SELECT [number % 10], number FROM numbers(100);
CREATE TABLE test2 (x Nullable(Float64), y String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO test2 SELECT CAST(number AS Nullable(Float64)), toString(number) FROM numbers(50);
CREATE TABLE test3 (id UInt64, data Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
